visual_direction: Sunset Coral & Deep Indigo. High contrast, sharp edges, distinct technical typography, surprise and delight micro-interactions.

layout_and_spacing.login: Split/Asymmetric focus: Bold center card with a heavy noise texture on the deep indigo root background. Login card uses generous p-10 padding.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_shell: Top header with stark contrast. Sticky tab navigation below it using 'Control Room' tight spacing. Generous spacing (p-6) in the main container.
layout_and_spacing.file_manager: Bento-style file manager layout. Sticky toolbar. Dense table rows (py-3) with multi-select checkboxes on the left.

glass_grain_depth_recipe.glassmorphism: backdrop-filter: blur(16px); background: rgba(var(--bg-card), 0.7); border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
glass_grain_depth_recipe.noise_texture: Use a subtle SVG noise filter overlay on the login background and dashboard header for a tactile, dev-tool feel.
glass_grain_depth_recipe.depth: Replace flat dark slate with layered depth. 1px solid inner strokes. Root bg -> Panel bg -> Card bg.

component_recipes.button_primary: background: var(--accent-coral); color: white; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 16px; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.2); transition: all 0.2s; hover: filter brightness(1.1); active: border-bottom-width: 0px; transform: translateY(2px);
component_recipes.button_ghost: background: transparent; color: var(--text-secondary); border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle); hover: background: var(--bg-card); color: var(--text-primary);
component_recipes.button_danger: background: rgba(var(--danger), 0.1); color: var(--danger); border: 1px solid rgba(var(--danger), 0.2); hover: background: var(--danger); color: white;
component_recipes.input_field: background: var(--bg-panel); border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle); border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; color: var(--text-primary); font-family: var(--font-mono); focus: border-color: var(--accent-coral); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(var(--accent-coral), 0.2);
component_recipes.file_row: border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle); padding: 12px 0; hover: background: var(--bg-card-hover); transition: background 0.2s. Checked state: background: var(--selection-bg);
component_recipes.action_chip: background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle); color: var(--text-secondary); border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; hover: color: var(--accent-coral); border-color: var(--accent-coral);
component_recipes.modal: Fixed center, glassmorphism overlay (background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6); backdrop-filter: blur(8px)). Modal content: background: var(--bg-panel); border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 24px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); padding: 24px;
component_recipes.tab_nav: background: transparent; color: var(--text-secondary); font-weight: 500; padding: 12px 20px; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; hover: color: var(--text-primary); Active: border-color: var(--accent-coral); color: var(--accent-coral);
component_recipes.drop_overlay: position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(var(--accent-indigo), 0.1); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); border: 2px dashed var(--accent-indigo); border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--accent-indigo); font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px;

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Read this entire JSON file carefully to understand the Sunset Coral + Deep Indigo design language.
2. Edit /app/frontend/src/App.css: Replace the generic `:root` and `.panel-light` variables with the exact hex codes provided in `color_system`.
3. Edit /app/frontend/src/App.css: Change font imports from DM Sans/Inter to `IBM Plex Sans` and `JetBrains Mono` from Google Fonts. Apply them across body and headings/paths.
4. Edit /app/frontend/src/App.css: Overhaul component classes (e.g. `.fm-btn--primary`, `.panel-input-group input`, `.panel-tab`) matching the `component_recipes` mapping.

5. Edit /app/frontend/src/pages/PanelLogin.js: Implement functional features: 6-digit PIN input with show/hide toggle, rate-limit countdown logic (on error), caps-lock indicator on username, and remember-username checkbox.
6. Edit /app/frontend/src/components/panel/FileManager.js: Add multi-select rows (add a checkbox column to the left). Create a bulk action toolbar when items are selected allowing bulk delete/move.
7. Edit /app/frontend/src/components/panel/FileManager.js: Implement live folder search/filter (add an input field in `fm-toolbar` that filters the mapped `files` array by name).
8. Edit /app/frontend/src/components/panel/FileManager.js: Add keyboard shortcuts (e.g. `Delete` key for deletion modal, `Ctrl+A`/`Cmd+A` to select all files).
9. Edit /app/frontend/src/components/panel/FileManager.js: Add image-file thumbnail preview (if `isWebFile` or matches image extensions, load the thumbnail in the row or as an icon fallback).
CRITICAL: Do not remove or alter any existing `data-testid` attributes across all files. They are vital for testing.
